metadata.name: vaultpact_escrow
metadata.description: Holdfast Escrow Engine — trustless pact escrow for AI agents

accounts.name: escrow_authority
docs: Derived from this program's ID; no on-chain account needed.

errors.name: ZeroEscrowAmount
errors.msg: Escrow amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: DuplicateParticipants
errors.msg: Initiator, beneficiary, and arbiter must all be distinct

errors.name: TimeLockInPast
errors.msg: Time lock expiry must be in the future

errors.name: UnsupportedMintVersion
errors.msg: Mint is owned by Token-2022 program; only classic SPL Token is supported in v0.1

errors.name: InvalidStatus
errors.msg: Invalid escrow status for this operation

errors.name: UnauthorizedSigner
errors.msg: Unauthorized signer for this operation

errors.name: VaultBalanceMismatch
errors.msg: Vault balance does not match expected total

errors.name: TimeLockNotExpired
errors.msg: Time lock has not yet expired

errors.name: DisputeWindowOpen
errors.msg: Dispute window has not ended

errors.name: DisputeWindowClosed
errors.msg: Dispute window has ended

errors.name: NotParticipant
errors.msg: Signer must be initiator or beneficiary

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow in payout calculation

errors.name: InvalidBasisPoints
errors.msg: SplitFunds beneficiary_bps must be <= 10000

errors.name: VaultNotEmpty
errors.msg: Vault must be empty before closing escrow

errors.name: ResolutionDeadlineNotPassed
errors.msg: Dispute resolution deadline has not passed

errors.name: DecisionRequired
errors.msg: Arbiter decision must not be None when resolving

errors.name: AgentNotActive
errors.msg: Agent wallet status is not Active; new pact commitments require Active status

errors.name: AgentBlacklisted
errors.msg: Agent is blacklisted; settlement and claims are blocked

errors.name: AgentWalletAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: Agent wallet authority does not match the expected escrow party

errors.name: AgentNotBlacklisted
errors.msg: Blacklisted wallet is not actually blacklisted (status != 2)

errors.name: WalletNotPactParty
errors.msg: Blacklisted wallet does not belong to either escrow party

errors.name: UnauthorizedProtocolAuthority
errors.msg: Caller is not the protocol authority from AttestationRegistry

errors.name: UnauthorizedTokenAccount
errors.msg: Token account owner does not match the expected escrow party

errors.name: BeneficiaryAlreadyStaked
errors.msg: Beneficiary has already staked; cannot stake twice

errors.name: InvalidVerifTier
errors.msg: Invalid verification tier value (must be 0, 1, or 2)

errors.name: InvalidDisputeDeadline
errors.msg: dispute_deadline_secs must be >= 3600 (minimum 1-hour arbiter window)

errors.name: DisputeAlreadyEscalated
errors.msg: Dispute has already been escalated; escalation is a one-shot operation

errors.name: DisputeNotEscalated
errors.msg: Dispute has not been escalated; call escalate_dispute first

errors.name: EscalationGracePeriodNotPassed
errors.msg: Escalation grace period has not passed; fallback refund not yet available

errors.name: PactEscrowMismatch
errors.msg: PactRecord does not belong to this EscrowAccount

errors.name: ReputationAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Reputation account does not belong to the expected escrow party

errors.name: StakeBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Stake amount is below the protocol minimum (1000 base units)

errors.name: SlashRequiresStake
errors.msg: slash_loser_stake requires both initiator_stake and beneficiary_stake to be non-zero

errors.name: DisputeInProgress
errors.msg: A dispute is in progress; mutual cancellation is not allowed

errors.name: BlacklistedSigner
errors.msg: One or more signers are blacklisted; mutual cancellation is blocked

types.name: AgentWallet
docs: On-chain identity record for a single AI agent.
Analogous to Hardline's VaultState, stripped of all human-specific fields.

types.name: AttestationRegistry
docs: Protocol-level singleton tracking all registered agent wallets.

types.name: ReputationAccount
docs: On-chain reputation record for a single AI agent.
Rent cost: ~0.00358 SOL, paid by the agent at init_reputation.
